column1: comment_text
It's okay to claim 'next' on a machine that's currently in use.
You shouldn't be able to claim 'next'—whoever is there when a machine finishes gets it.
Placing quarters on a machine that's in use is a fair way to claim it next.
Placing a basket by a machine that's in use is a fair way to claim it next.
It's okay to move someone's finished laundry from the dryer to the folding table or a chair.
It's okay to move someone's finished laundry from the washer to an open dryer.
You should never touch someone else's laundry
column2: even if it's been sitting there a while.

column1: I try to collect my laundry within 10 minutes of the cycle ending.
5 minutes is enough grace period before moving someone's finished laundry.
People should get at least 15 minutes to collect their laundry before it's moved.
If you move someone's laundry
column2: it should go in their basket or on a clean surface—not the floor.

column1: If you spill detergent
column2: you should clean it up immediately.

column1: Everyone should clean the lint trap after using the dryer.
If a machine is broken or malfunctioning
column2: you should report it to building management right away.

column1: People should wipe down the inside of the washer if they notice residue after their load.
It's fine to leave your laundry basket in the room while your cycle runs.
Playing music or taking phone calls in the laundry room should be avoided.
I like when neighbors say hi in the laundry room.
I prefer to be left alone when doing laundry.
If you use bleach in a laundry load
column2: you should run an empty rinse cycle afterward to protect the next person's clothes.

column1: I should be able to use bleach in my laundry without having to do anything special afterward.
Strongly scented detergents should be avoided in shared machines out of consideration for people with sensitivities.
People should be able to use whatever detergent they prefer in shared machines.
It's fine to use multiple washers or dryers at once.
People should limit themselves to one washer and one dryer at a time.
If I find a forgotten item like a sock
column2: I leave it somewhere visible like the folding table.

column1: There should be a designated lost-and-found spot in the laundry room.
Management should fix broken machines within 48 hours of being reported.
Management should do regular maintenance on machines
column2: not just wait for them to break.

column1: Laundry costs too much in this building.
